projects.name: Crypvault
platforms: and anywhere else you can get a web browser
projects.description: The best open-sourced digital asset manager that keeps your money safe from thieves with extremely secure biometrics, all in your web browser.

projects.name: Umbra
projects.description: A powerful scripting API and artificial neural network application which allows you to deobfuscate and modify internal engine code, and publish your changes on the fly. Above all else, we're a community that stands for free speech and a free Internet for all. Serving ≈{bUsers} premium users and ≈{bDkUsers} developers (and counting).

projects.name: Umbra External Purchase API
projects.description: An external API which allows you to accept purchases from external payment providers without leaving the game. Whenever a user wishes to purchase something, a pop-up window is created, requiring minimal effort from the user.

projects.name: gba.js.org
projects.description: GBA Online is a light-weight online emulator for the GameBoy Advance that I worked on from October 2021 to February 2022. It's hosted online at gba.js.org.
